cards.title: bridge post ship
cards.notes: # TalkBridge Build Plan — Repeatable Process ## Lineage (DO NOT DEVIATE) ``` bridge-pre-base-cc.html → bridge-base-cc.html → bridge-pre-ship-cc.html → bridge-ship-cc.html (source) (all bugs fixed) (8 cases flawless) (ship features) ``` Source file: `/home/user/stuff/bridge-pre-base-cc.html` ([**2913 lines, lint-clean)**](https://-.com) ## State Verification — Run This First Every Session ```bash cd /home/user/stuff # 1. Lint all three for f in bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html; do python3 -c "import re; txt=open('$f').read(); m=re.search(r'(.*?)',txt,re.DOTALL); open('/tmp/lint.js','w').write(m.group(1))" [**node**](https://check.com) /tmp/lint.js && echo "LINT PASS: $f" || echo "LINT FAIL: $f" done # 2. Required functions present in all three for fn in _ftStartupDone _loadFastText _syncFtStatus onDGFinal isDupe startDeepgram translateWithRetry toggleKeysPanel openLog showThankYou; do for f in bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html; do grep -q "function $fn" "$f" && echo "OK: $fn in $f" || echo "MISSING: $fn in $f" done done # 3. Fixes verified echo "=== startup overlay vars (must be 0) ===" && grep -c "_ftEnsureStartupOverlay\|var _ftStartupOverlay\|var _ftStartupStatus" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== composeFocusMute (must be 0) ===" && grep -c "composeFocusMute\|_pbMutedMic" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== applyNorthernThaiMap called in onDGFinal (must be 0) ===" && grep -c "applyNorthernThaiMap(text)" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== smoke uses raw predict (must be 3) ===" && grep -c "ft.predict(pair\[0\]" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== Thai vowel regex extended range (must be 3) ===" && grep -c "ะ-ู็" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== norm fallback present (must be 2 each) ===" && grep -c "norm_fallback\|src=_detected" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== voice retry present (must be 2 each) ===" && grep -c "translateWithRetry(srcText,src,tgt,0)" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== DG lang per room (must be 3) ===" && grep -c "language=.*encodeURIComponent(langCode)" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== role:room.role in startDeepgram (B11, must be 1 each) ===" && grep -c "role:room\.role" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== reconnect banner absent (must be 0) ===" && grep -c "reconnect-banner\|showReconnectBanner\|forceReconnect" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== relay always retries (must be 3) ===" && grep -c "wsReconnectTimer=setTimeout" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== cred_restore log present (must be 3) ===" && grep -c "cred_restore" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== DG multi fix present (must be 3) ===" && grep -c "DG_MULTI_LANGS.indexOf" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html echo "=== English marker detection present (must be 3) ===" && [**grep -c "don't.*I'm.*you're\|morning.*afternoon.*evening" bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html ```**](https://-.com) ## Fixes Applied to All Three Files (DO NOT REVERT) | [**Fix | What | Status | |**](https://---|------|--------|.com) | B1 | Removed `applyNorthernThaiMap(text)` from `onDGFinal` — caused silent text drops | ✅ Done | | B1+ | Restored Thai vowel-joining regex with extended range `ะ-ู` covering sara u/uu | ✅ Done | | B2 | Null guard after Promise.race: `if(!detected)detected=detectLang(text,src)` | ✅ Done | | B3 | `detectLang` stub: unicode ranges + Latin-in-non-Latin detection (ASCII-only check) | ✅ Done | | B4/B5 | WASM asset paths use `/stuff/fastType/` prefix | ✅ Done | | B6 | `_ftPredictLabel` handles Map/Array/Object/string; confidence thresholds per mode | ✅ Done | | B7 | `button svg, button svg *{pointer-events:none;}` — SVG click intercept | ✅ Done | | B8 | TTS reads `data-tts-lang` from entry, not `room.myLang` | ✅ Done | | B9 | Use button dispatches `input` event to enable Send | ✅ Done | | B10 | `trFailed` detection → `⚠ not translated` badge on transcript entry | ✅ Done | | B11 | `role:room.role` in `startDeepgram` log (was `role:role` ReferenceError) | ✅ Done | | B12 | `DEDUP_MS=4000`, substring threshold `>8` chars | ✅ Done | | B13 | `bil(key)` helper renders dual-language labels in goodbye screen | ✅ Done | | HA | Startup overlay removed — `_ftStartupDone` only logs + calls `_syncFtStatus()` | ✅ Done | | HB | Smoke test uses raw `ft.predict()` — no confidence threshold gate | ✅ Done | | HC | `composeFocusMute` / `_pbRestoreMic` / `_pbMutedMic` removed — no auto-mute on chat focus | ✅ Done | | N1 | Normalization fallback: if en→ch step returns unchanged text, `src=detected` | ✅ Done | | N2 | Voice retry: `translateWithRetry(srcText,src,tgt,0)` before marking `trFailed` | ✅ Done | | N3 | DG uses `language=` per room — WASM normalization handles cross-language | ✅ Done | | N4 | DG `language=multi` when myLang in `['en','es','fr','de','pt','it','nl','ru','hi','ja']` — fires finals for any Latin speech in Latin rooms | ✅ Done | | N5 | `_detectLangAsync` English marker check before WASM: pure ASCII + marker word → `'en'`. Markers: th-cluster (the/this/that/those/these/they/them/their/there/then/though/three) + question words (what/where/when/why/who/how) + you/your/are/were/have/hello/good/morning/afternoon/evening/-ing words + contractions (don't/can't/I'm/you're/it's etc.) | ✅ [**Done | | S1 | Reconnect banner removed — relay always auto-retries silently every 2s forever | ✅ Done | | S2 | Lobby layout compacted — inputs 8px padding, fits at 100% browser zoom | ✅ Done | | S3 | cred_restore log on init — shows localStorage state at startup | ✅ Done |**](https://-.com) ## [**The 8 Normalization Cases Room pair LangX→LangY, input LangZ. | # | Case | Detection path | Status | |**](https://-|------|----------------|--------|.com) | 1 | chat zh→en, Z=zh | unicode shortcut → 'zh'=src, direct translate zh→en | ✅ Works | | 2 | chat zh→en, Z=en | B3 stub: non-Latin src + ASCII → 'en'; chat forgiving (no trFailed) | ✅ Works | | 3 | speak zh→en, Z=zh | DG zh-CN + unicode → 'zh'=src, direct translate zh→en | ✅ Works | | 4 | speak es→en, Z=en | DG multi (N4) fires English text; N5 English marker → 'en' → normalize en→es→en | ✅ Works | | 5 | chat es→zh, Z=es | No unicode, no marker → WASM → 'es'=src, direct translate es→zh | ✅ Works | | 6 | chat es→zh, Z=fr | No marker → WASM → 'fr'≠src → normalize fr→es → translate es→zh | ✅ WASM | | 7 | speak es→zh, Z=es | DG multi + WASM → 'es'=src, direct translate es→zh | ✅ Works | | 8 | speak es→zh, Z=fr | DG multi fires French; WASM → 'fr'≠src → normalize fr→es; N2 fallback | ✅ WASM+N2 | Cases 6+8 require WASM. Cases 1-5, 7 work independently of WASM. **Case 4 detail (updated)**: DG `language=multi` (N4) produces clean English text for English speech in Latin rooms. N5 English marker check in `_detectLangAsync` fires BEFORE WASM for pure ASCII English text (th-cluster words, question words, contractions). This gives `detected='en'` → normalization fires: translate en→es (get Spanish srcText) → translate es→en (English translation for transcript). WASM alone was unreliable for short English text in Latin rooms — it returned 'es' with false high confidence. The marker bypass is the correct pre-WASM gate. **Case 4 zh→en sub-case**: DG `language=zh-CN` produces garbled text for English speech (e.g., "i'mspekingenglish。" with CJK period). B3 stub fires for PURE ASCII — but CJK punctuation breaks pure-ASCII check. This sub-case is limited by DG zh-CN and is not fully solvable without using `language=multi` for zh rooms (which is not supported by nova-3). [**Accept as known limitation.**](https://-.com) ## Architecture: Key Functions **WASM startup:** `_loadFastText()` → probe assets → load wrapper → smoke test (raw predict) → `_ftStartupDone(ok)` → `_syncFtStatus()` **Speech path:** `onDGFinal(text)` → normalizeText → Thai vowel regex → isDupe → recFinal → Promise.race([_detectLangAsync, 150ms fallback]) → if detected≠src: normalize(en→ch) with fallback → translate(ch→en) with retry → patchTr **Chat path:** `sendChat()` → same detection/normalize flow → translate with retry → appendTrDom → relaySend **WASM detection:** `_detectLangAsync(text)` → unicode shortcuts (th/ja/zh/ko/ar/hi/ru) → **N5 English marker check** (pure ASCII + marker word → 'en' immediately, no WASM) → WASM for remaining Latin text → `_ftPredictLabel` with confidence threshold **Relay:** `connectRelay()` → [**WebSocket → onclose: always retry every 2000ms while in call — no banner, no fail count limit.**](https://-.com) ## Constraints (PERMANENT — never violate) - No PiP changes - No auto-mute changes (composeFocusMute stays REMOVED) - [**No "Ask Again" button - Every utterance and chat message must produce a visible result - No out-of-scope features - Joiner credentials: session-only, never localStorage**](https://-.com) ## Pre-Ship Additions (base → pre-ship) - `_ftDegraded` flag in `_ftStartupDone(false,...)` - `_syncFtStatus` three states: green (ready/hidden), yellow (degraded), red (failed) - CSS: `.ft-status-dot.warn{background:#f39c12;}` ## Ship Additions (pre-ship → ship) - C12: Transcript scroll — newest at top, ↑ indicator - C13: `_pbCardState={}` reset before phrasebook search render - C14: Phrasebook inline editing (source/target contenteditable) - C15: Phrasebook button in transcript header - Thai overlay: `thaiWrap()` + `.thai-overlay` [**CSS**](https://-.com) ## Pending: N6 — Dual DG for Non-Latin Rooms **Problem:** English speech in zh/th/ko/ar rooms produces zero output. DG `language=zh-CN` doesn't transcribe English. `language=multi` doesn't support zh/th/ko/ar. No fix possible with a single DG connection. **Fix:** Open a second DG WebSocket (`dgWsEn`) with `language=en` alongside the primary, only when `myLang` in `['zh','th','ko','ar']`. The audio worklet already sends PCM to the main thread — main thread forwards each chunk to both sockets. Both feed `onDGFinal`. `isDupe` prevents double-processing. ``` User speaks Chinese → dgWs (zh-CN) fires → onDGFinal → translate zh→en ✅ User speaks English → dgWsEn (en) fires → onDGFinal → N5 detects 'en' → normalize en→zh → translate zh→en ✅ ``` **Implementation — changes to startDeepgram:** 1. Add `var dgWsEn=null;` alongside `var dgWs=null;` 2. After primary `dgWs` opens: if `myLang` in `['zh','th','ko','ar']`, open `dgWsEn` with `language=en`, same model/params 3. In `dgProc.port.onmessage` (PCM forwarding): send to `dgWsEn` as well if open (`readyState===1`) 4. `dgWsEn.onmessage`: same handler as primary (parse JSON → call `onDGFinal`) 5. `dgWsEn.onclose`: if still in call, reopen once; after that, let it go (no infinite retry) 6. In `stopDeepgram`/teardown: close `dgWsEn` alongside `dgWs` **No changes to:** `onDGFinal`, `isDupe`, `_detectLangAsync`, `translateWithRetry`, relay, or worklet processor. **Applies to:** all 3 files (base → pre-ship → ship). --- (Reference — do not copy blindly) `test.html` [**is a separate app with overlapping WASM detection. Key differences and takeaways: | Aspect | test.html | bridge files | |**](https://------|-----------|--------------|.com) | FastText confidence threshold | 0.5 (`CONFIDENT_THRESHOLD`) | 0.58 speech / 0.50 chat | | WASM fallback (low-confidence) | Browser lang (`navigator.language`) | Falls back to `src` (room lang) | | English pre-detection | None — relies on FastText only | N5 marker check before WASM | | Latin-Latin pairs | FastText only — same fragility | N5 marker bypass is the fix | | DG language selection | Not applicable (no DG) | N4 multi for Latin rooms | | Language mode | auto/fixed per participant | Fixed by room.myLang | **Key confirmation**: test.html also relies purely on FastText for Latin-Latin detection and has no special handling for English-in-Spanish rooms. This validates that FastText alone is insufficient — our N5 marker-before-WASM approach is the right architecture. **Useful pattern not yet used**: test.html falls back to `navigator.language` when WASM confidence is low. Our app falls back to `src`. If WASM returns null for Latin text, using browser language as fallback would be more accurate than `src`. Low priority — N5 markers cover the common cases. ## Git Process (my job, not the user's) ```bash [**git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main git add bridge-base-cc.html bridge-pre-ship-cc.html bridge-ship-cc.html git commit -m "description" git push -u origin main git push -u origin main:claude/audit-talkbridge-recovery-UHws6 ``` Always fetch+rebase before push. Never skip. ## Current Branch `claude/audit-talkbridge-recovery-UHws6` — pushing to `main`**](https://-.com) ## Phrasebook Design (Pending Implementation) ### Architecture **Storage:** Language-pair keyed (e.g. `pb:en-es`), loaded from GitHub repo, 24h localStorage cache. Bidirectional — `en-es` and `es-en` loaded as a single pair. Entries have `{src, tgt, tags, usage, corrections}`. **Entry point:** `/` character in chat input triggers inline phrasebook search overlay. **Search UI:** Compact rows sorted by match strength. Format: ``` tags | source ▶ | target ▶ ``` - ▶ = inline TTS button per side - Enter selects → inserts `src` text into chat input (ready to send) - [**Bidirectional: match on tags, src, or tgt in either language **Drawer:** Current bottom drawer stays as full browse/edit surface. `/` search is the fast-access path.**](https://-.com) ### Translation Memory (TM) [**Tiers | Tier | Trigger | Action | |**](https://----|---------|--------|.com) | 1 — Exact match | Fingerprint hit (high usage, zero corrections) | Skip API entirely, use stored `tgt` | | 2 — Fuzzy match | Similarity ≥ 0.85 | Inject stored `tgt` as context hint to API | | 3 — Glossary | Key terms present in source | Inject term pairs as glossary into translate call | **Fingerprint:** `{src_norm, src_lang, tgt_lang}` → SHA-1 short hash stored with entry. Match on normalized (lowercased, punctuation-stripped) source text. **Confidence scoring loop:** - `usage++` each time entry is selected and sent - `corrections++` each time the entry is edited post-send (clarify stream event) - `confidence = usage / (usage + corrections * 3)` - [**Tier 1 bypass activates when `confidence ≥ 0.90 && usage ≥ 5`**](https://-.com) ### Clarify Stream Every phrasebook edit (source OR target updated) emits: ```json { "ts": 1716000000000, "src_lang": "en", "tgt_lang": "es", "before_src": "Good morning", "before_tgt": "Buenos días", "after_src": "Good morning", "after_tgt": "Buenas mañanas" } ``` - Stored in `pb_clarify:` localStorage array (ring buffer, max 500) - [**User can review and delete individual entries - Correction deltas feed back into confidence scoring - Future: sync clarify stream to cloud as fine-tuning signal**](https://-.com) ### GitHub Sync - Phrasebook source: `acmeproducts/stuff` repo, path `phrasebooks/-.json` - On room join: fetch if cache stale (>24h) or missing - Format: `[{src, tgt, tags:[]}]` — no IDs, no metadata (added locally) - [**Local additions/edits stored separately in `pb_local:`, merged at read time - Push-back to GitHub: NOT automated — user must manually export if desired**](https://-.com) ### Implementation Order (when ready to build) 1. `_pbLoad(srcLang, tgtLang)` — fetch from GitHub + merge local, cache 24h 2. `_pbSearch(query, srcLang, tgtLang)` — fuzzy match across src/tgt/tags 3. Chat input `/` handler — show overlay, live-filter on keypress 4. Overlay row render — tags | src ▶ | tgt ▶ format 5. TTS buttons per row (reuse existing TTS path) 6. Enter-to-select — insert src into chat input, close overlay 7. Edit path in drawer → emit clarify stream event 8. TM Tier 1 check in `translateWithRetry` — before API call 9. TM Tier 2/3 — inject context/glossary into API params
